name: sde-interview-script-skill
description: Generate language-selectable Excalidraw-style script cards from pasted text, with a short $card entrypoint.

interface.longDescription: Turn pasted text into English-default or user-selected-language speakable scripts embedded in handwritten Excalidraw-style boards. Use the short $card skill for general text, or the SDE preset for interview prep.
defaultPrompt: Use $card to turn this text into an Excalidraw-style preview image and link only.
Draw an Excalidraw card with a blue decision flow.
